overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character travels from a covered walkway under an overpass, across busy streets with light traffic, to a plaza featuring the prominent 'BD SHACK' neon sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under futuristic overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the covered overpass following other pedestrians through the neon-lit corridor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding black umbrella walking ahead on the right side

entered.detail: large concrete and metal overpass structure with red structural beams spanning overhead
futuristic curved glass building with teal framing on the right side
blue and red metal railing separating sidewalk from the road
purple and pink neon light strips mounted on the overpass ceiling
large illuminated screen displaying advertisements on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive futuristic overpass with purple neon lighting casting colorful reflections on the wet concrete sidewalk. The camera follows pedestrians walking through this covered corridor, with a distinctive glass dome building visible on the right and metal safety railings lining the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city sidewalk with palm trees and street lighting

events.description: exits covered overpass into open street with visible sky and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking along open sidewalk approaching the large intersection ahead

entered.detail: tall palm tree with fronds illuminated by streetlights on the left side of the road
tall modern streetlights with multiple lamps lighting the roadway
wet asphalt road with multiple lanes showing light trails from passing vehicles
tall buildings with illuminated windows and neon signage in the background

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered overpass, the scene opens to a rainy night sky with palm trees lining the left side of the street. The camera continues forward along the wet sidewalk toward a large intersection, with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance and cars creating light trails on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with futuristic elevated highway

events.description: crossing the wide intersection with yellow crosswalk markings while traffic waits

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection toward the futuristic elevated highway structure with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in black outfit with umbrella walking parallel to the camera

entered.detail: massive elevated transit structure with glowing green neon lights underneath
large blue illuminated sign reading 'AESCULAPIUS' on a building facade
yellow and white painted crosswalk lines on the wet reflective asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a vast urban intersection with yellow crosswalk markings reflecting on the wet pavement. The futuristic elevated highway looms ahead with its distinctive green neon underlighting, while the Aesculapius building sign becomes visible on the right. Pedestrians with umbrellas move in the same direction across the expansive plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit plaza in front of BD SHACK building

events.description: arriving at BD SHACK plaza with prominent red neon signage becoming the focal point

agents.ego_description: approaching the BD SHACK building through the reflective plaza with neon lights

notable_agents.action: character in red outfit walking past the camera toward the right

entered.detail: large prominent red neon sign reading 'BD SHACK' mounted on a building
futuristic illuminated blue seating structures on the right side of the plaza
modern building facade with glass and metal elements on the right

segments.scene_description: Arriving at the destination plaza, the prominent red 'BD SHACK' neon sign dominates the center of the view. The ground transitions to reflective paved tiles showing colorful neon reflections. Glowing blue benches line the right side of the pedestrian plaza as the character approaches the building entrance, with other pedestrians moving through the vibrant cyberpunk environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered neon corridor into a vast, rain-soaked urban plaza. It begins under a massive futuristic overpass where purple neon lighting reflects off wet concrete and a glass dome building stands to the right. As the camera exits the covered walkway, the scene opens to a rainy night sky and palm trees lining the street, moving forward toward a large intersection filled with distant skyscrapers and light trails from passing cars. The view then expands as the character crosses yellow-marked pavement toward a green-lit elevated highway and the Aesculapius building sign, following a crowd of pedestrians with umbrellas. Finally, the environment shifts into a vibrant pedestrian plaza where the ground becomes reflective paved tiles and glowing blue benches lead the way toward a dominant red BD SHACK neon sign.
